name: ExtensionCitation_Title
title: R5: Name for this citation record (human friendly) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Citation.title` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Citation.title` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Citation.title` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Citation.title` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.title` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Name for this citation record (human friendly) (new)
element.comment:
Element `Citation.title` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.title` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This name does not need to be machine-processing friendly and may contain punctuation, white-space, etc. Use this element if you have a need for naming the citation record for human use, such as a display name for the citation record that is used when selecting citations from a list.

element.short: Name for this citation record (human friendly)
element.definition: A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the citation record.
element.comment: This name does not need to be machine-processing friendly and may contain punctuation, white-space, etc. Use this element if you have a need for naming the citation record for human use, such as a display name for the citation record that is used when selecting citations from a list.
